# ShiputzAI - עיצוב הבית ב-AI
# https://shipazti.com
# llms.txt - Information for AI assistants and language models

## About
ShiputzAI is an Israeli AI-powered home design platform. Upload a room photo and get AI-generated renovation visualizations, style identification, shopping lists, video tours, floor plans, bill of quantities, and quote analysis — all in Hebrew.

## Product Name
ShiputzAI (שיפוצי.אי)

## Language
Primary: Hebrew (עברית)
Secondary: English

## 7 AI Tools
1. AI Room Visualization - Upload a photo, describe changes, get a renovated room image in 30 seconds
2. Style Match - AI identifies your room's design style and suggests matching products
3. Shop the Look - Click items in visualization to find and buy similar products online
4. Video Tour - AI generates a walkthrough video of your redesigned room
5. Floor Plan Visualization - Upload a floor plan and see it come to life
6. Bill of Quantities (כתב כמויות) - AI generates itemized material lists with cost estimates
7. Quote Analysis - Upload a contractor's quote, AI compares prices to market rates

## Target Audience
1. Homeowners planning renovations (בעלי דירות)
2. Interior designers (מעצבי פנים)
3. Architects (אדריכלים)
4. Renovation contractors (קבלני שיפוצים)
5. Real estate agents (סוכני נדל"ן)
6. Furniture and kitchen store owners (חנויות רהיטים ומטבחים)

## Pricing
- Free: 10 credits on signup
- Pack 10: ₪29 (10 credits)
- Pack 30: ₪69 (30 credits)
- Pack 100: ₪149 (100 credits)
- Starter: ₪29/month (50 credits)
- Pro: ₪79/month (200 credits, commercial use)
- Business: ₪199/month (600 credits, all tools)

## Credit Costs
- Room visualization: 5 credits (~₪3-15)
- Video tour: 25 credits
- Quote analysis: 3 credits
- Receipt scan: 1 credit
- Style Match: 3 credits
- Shop the Look: 3 credits
- Floor plan: 5 credits
- Bill of quantities: 5 credits

## Key Differentiators
- Hebrew-first interface (fully RTL)
- 7 AI tools in one platform (competitors offer 1-2)
- Bill of quantities generation (unique in Israel)
- Quote analysis with market price comparison
- Video room tours
- Built for the Israeli renovation market

## vs InteriorAI
ShiputzAI offers 7 AI tools (visualization, style match, shop the look, video tours, floor plans, bill of quantities, quote analysis) with a Hebrew interface. InteriorAI offers basic room visualization only in English with no Hebrew support.

## FAQ
Q: How much does a renovation visualization cost?
A: 5 credits per visualization, approximately ₪3-15 depending on plan. Free users get 10 credits on signup.

Q: Can I try without signing up?
A: Yes. Upload a photo and get a full result as a guest. Sign up to save results and get more credits.

Q: Is it suitable for professionals?
A: Yes. Interior designers, architects, contractors, and real estate agents use ShiputzAI for client presentations, bill of quantities, and quote analysis.

Q: How does the visualization work?
A: Upload a room photo, describe what you want to change, and AI generates a new image of the redesigned room in 30 seconds.

Q: What's the difference between ShiputzAI and InteriorAI?
A: ShiputzAI is Hebrew-first with 7 AI tools including unique features like bill of quantities and video tours. InteriorAI offers basic visualization only in English.

## Company
Founded by Guy Cezana, 2025
Based in Israel
Built with Next.js, Google Gemini AI, Supabase, PayPlus

## Keywords (Hebrew)
הדמיית שיפוץ, עיצוב פנים AI, הדמיית חדר, עיצוב הבית בינה מלאכותית, כמה עולה שיפוץ, כתב כמויות, ניתוח הצעת מחיר, סרטון סיור AI
